plugins.name: sentinel-kb
plugins.description: Security scanner with 287 static rules + a 15,800-finding knowledge base from 85 audit firms. Layered pipeline (regex → triage → Semgrep → AI triage), auto-picks engines, outputs text/JSON/SARIF.
